title: phyllanthus niruri var. tenuicaulis
intro: Phyllanthus niruri var. tenuicaulis, also known as the 'narrow-stemmed Phyllanthus', is a variant of the Phyllanthus niruri plant, a type of flowering herbaceous plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Phyllanthus niruri var. tenuicaulis include reducing liver inflammation, treating viral hepatitis, and alleviating fever, among others. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant are typically dried and made into capsules, tinctures, or teas, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of forms.
